A FRIEND IN COSTA RICA

Easy booking on WhatsApp and live Costa Rica like a local

Homes, villas, and tours around Arenal Volcano with personal attention, real recommendations, and stress-free logistics.

  • Flexible check-in and immediate support
  • Private tours and reliable transportation
  • Ideal for families, couples, and groups
Quote on WhatsApp

120+ happy guests · Fast response

WE ARE AFORTUNADOS

15+ years creating local experiences in La Fortuna and Costa Rica

Local platform with our own homes, curated tours, and personalized support so you travel without stress.

  • Vacation homes carefully designed
  • Exclusive agreements with parks and operators
  • Fast local support before and during your trip
15+ years of experience
Personalized attention

At Afortunados, we have spent more than 15 years turning dreams into unforgettable experiences. We started as a simple Facebook page offering local lodging and tours in La Fortuna, and thanks to the commitment and passion of our team, today we are an integrated and exclusive platform of tourism services in Costa Rica.

We have our own vacation homes, carefully designed to provide comfort, warmth, and a genuine connection with nature. We also have exclusive agreements with parks and the best tour operators in the country, allowing us to offer not only the best prices, but also close support to enjoy each destination fully.

Our passion for unique experiences goes beyond borders, organizing exclusive trips for our clients to fascinating international destinations such as Turkey, Indonesia, Thailand, Greece, Mexico, South America, and beautiful European capitals.

What truly sets us apart is our multidisciplinary team, with extensive experience in hospitality, gastronomy, sales, tour operations, and personalized attention. We strongly believe that responsibility and care in every detail make the difference.

At Afortunados, we do not sell only tourism services, we share experiences filled with family warmth, peace of mind, and trust. Our mission is clear: to become the leading platform and reference to discover Costa Rica in an authentic, safe, personalized way, full of Costa Rican hospitality.

Welcome to Afortunados, where every trip is a story you will want to tell again and again!
